name: Matica Technologies AG
summary: Matica Technologies AG develops, manufactures, and distributes solutions to issue passports, financial cards, ID cards, and Nano and micro SIM cards worldwide. The company offers direct to card ID printers, retransfer printers and laminators, laser engraving systems, and passport printers; desktop solutions, such as metal plate embossers, credit and debit cards issuance systems, prepackaged desktop systems, and industrial desktop systems for low and mid-volume issuance programs; kiosk card printers; mid-range and mailing systems; and centralized issuance and mailing systems under the Matica brand name. Its products are used in financial, government, corporate, education, transit/transportation, health care/insurance, retail, telecommunication, and entertainment/clubs/hotel applications. The company has a strategic partnership with Canon Finetech Nisca Inc. for the development of Matica EDIsecure MC660, a 600dpi card printer for security applications. Matica Technologies AG was founded in 1992 and is headquartered in Munich, Germany. Matica Technologies AG is a subsidiary of Matica System S.p.A.
